ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_phone" INTEGER /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store manager */,
  "store_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., store manager, sales associate, customer service representative) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold at which to reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when threshold is met */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who interacted with the store */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., purchase, return, complaint) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity_purchased" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Amount of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" INTEGER /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
